name: Fideo
recipeIngredient: 12 oz jar picante sauce (mild or medium)
1 cup julienned nopalitos (cactus) OR 12 oz jar pickled cactus drained and rinsed OR (in a pinch) 2 julienned and blanched bell peppers
1 can pinto, poquito, anasazi, pink or other beans of your choice
1 small can (4 oz?) diced green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
2. Blanch cactus if using fresh.
3. Drain beans and green chiles.
4. Toss all ingredients together.
This dish is best at room temperature, although it is good hot or cold as well. You can add various ingredients such as corn, fresh tomatoes, cilantro, scallions, blanched chayote squash, etc.
